case_title: SHERMAN ACQUISITION II, L.P. VS. GRISELDA HERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: FILING FEE PAID FOR PROPOSED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHERMAN ACQUISITION II, L.P.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-16-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-07-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
